name: Cashew Chicken #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the salt and flour.
2. Cut chicken into small pieces; dredge in the well mixed flour mixture. Let stand for 15 minutes in the flour mixture.
3. Mix the milk and eggs.
4. Remove chicken from the flour mixture and place in the egg mixture; let stand for 10 minutes.
5. Remove chicken from the egg mixture and roll again in the flour mixture.
6. Immediately deep fry in peanut oil. Keep warm in the oven.
7. To make the sauce, combine the chicken broth, cornstarch, water, and soy sauce. Cook over medium heat until thick.
8. Pour the sauce over the fried chicken platter and top with chopped green onions and cashew nuts. Serve over wild rice.
